buildingAbbr.description: Abbreviation of the building associated with this bill split.

buildingID.description: Id of the building associated with this bill split.

glAccountID.description: Id of the general ledger account associated with this bill split.

markupDiscountSplit.description: Indicates if the bill split is tied to a markup discount.

paid.description: Indicates if the bill split has been paid.

portfolioAbbr.description: Abbreviation of the portfolio associated with this bill split.

portfolioID.description: Id of the portfolio associated with this bill split.

unitAbbr.description: Abbreviation of the unit associated with this bill split.

unitID.description: Id of the unit associated with this bill split.
